top_signals.title: China Expands Energy and Trade Partnerships in Central Asia
top_signals.summary: The chairman of Kazakhstan’s Atomic Energy Agency, Almassadam Satkaliyev, is on an extended tour of nuclear-power facilities in China, gaining insight into PRC management techniques covering the entire development cycle, from designing to construction to operation of such entities. Satkaliyev visited a wide range of sites, from the Tianwan nuclear plant, which is fully operational, and the Xuwei nuclear facility, currently under construction, to uranium mining and fuel production sites and research and training entities. He also met with…
top_signals.why_it_matters: Geopolitical escalation affecting commodities, shipping and cross-asset volatility.

top_signals.title: AsyncAPI npm packages infected with credential-stealing malware
top_signals.summary: Five malicious versions of AsyncAPI packages were published to the Node Package Manager (npm) in a supply-chain attack that delivered a remote access trojan with info-stealing capabilities. [...]
top_signals.why_it_matters: Geopolitical escalation affecting commodities, shipping and cross-asset volatility.

top_signals.title: US Senator blasts AG pick for ‘dismantling’ crypto unit, Trump’s CZ pardon
top_signals.summary: President Donald Trump’s pick for US Attorney General faced criticism from members of the Senate Judiciary Committee on his approach to crypto enforcement and the pardon of former Binance CEO Changpeng Zhao.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Geopolitical escalation affecting commodities, shipping and cross-asset volatility.

top_signals.title: SpaceX sell-off wipes $1tn from Musk’s rocket group
top_signals.summary: Stock trades below $135 for first time since AI and space conglomerate’s Wall Street debut in June
top_signals.why_it_matters: AI and semiconductor developments impacting technology leadership and capex cycles.

top_signals.title: Coinbase’s Jesse Pollak hands Base app leadership to Cobie after admitting social bets fell short
top_signals.summary: Coinbase executive Jesse Pollak will focus on Base blockchain's infrastructure, prioritizing trading, stablecoin payments, and AI agents.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Digital asset volatility and institutional crypto positioning changes.

top_signals.title: Stripe and Advent make $53bn bid for PayPal
top_signals.summary: Shares in New York-listed group surge after offer from payments start-up and buyout firm

top_signals.title: Trump’s DNI pick grilled about election security, voter fraud
top_signals.summary: Senators pressed director of national intelligence nominee Jay Clayton about his stance on the 2020 election and previous statements about voter fraud. Other issues took a back seat.
